sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import './ModelCard.css'; function ModelCard({ model }) { return (
Bust {model.stats.bust} Waist {model.stats.waist} Hips {model.stats.hips}

{model.name}

{model.specialty}

📏 {model.height} 📍 {model.location} 🎂 Age {model.age}

{model.bio}

); } export default ModelCard;
